nasb.text: “Your words have been arrogant against Me,” says the Lord. “Yet you say, ‘What have we spoken against You?’

esv.text: “Your words have been hard against me, says the Lord. But you say, ‘How have we spoken against you?’

cnv.text: 耶和華說：“你們用無禮的話頂撞我。你們還問：‘我們用甚麼話頂撞了你呢？’

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“你们出言毁谤我，还问，‘我们怎么毁谤你了？’

csbs.text: 耶和华说：“你们用话语顶撞我，还问：‘我们是怎么用话语顶撞你的呢？’
